entities.name: Salesforce
entities.description: Salesforce, Inc. is an American multinational software company headquartered in

events.title: ClawHavoc MCP backdoor: CLI-Anything reaches 30K GitHub stars
events.description: CLI-Anything tool generates SKILL.md files that AI agents trust. Supply-chain scanners have no detection category for agent integration layer threats.

events.title: Google DeepMind UK employees vote to unionize over military contracts
events.description: Google DeepMind UK employees launched unionization bid over concerns about defense work with Israel and Pentagon.

events.title: CopilotKit raises $27M for AG-UI agent interface layer
events.description: CopilotKit raised $27M to build AG-UI, the interface layer between humans and AI agents. Adopted by Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Oracle.

events.title: Subquadratic emerges from stealth with SubQ model
events.description: Miami startup Subquadratic launched SubQ 1M-Preview, claiming first fully subquadratic LLM with 12M-token context. Raised $29M at $500M valuation.

events.title: US gov expands CAISI vetting to Microsoft, xAI, Google DeepMind
events.description: Microsoft, xAI and Google DeepMind signed agreements to give CAISI pre-release access to their AI models for national security testing.

events.title: GPT-5.5 launch party held at OpenAI HQ
events.description: OpenAI hosted exclusive GPT-5.5 launch party at SF HQ on 5/5 at 5:55pm. ChatGPT planned its own party. Sam Altman invited Elon Musk amid ongoing legal battle.

events.title: CAISI evaluates DeepSeek V4 Pro
events.description: NIST's CAISI published evaluation of DeepSeek V4 Pro, finding it more cost-efficient than GPT-5.4 mini on 5 of 7 benchmarks.

events.title: Sam Altman reveals OpenClaw agent usage
events.description: Sam Altman tells Patrick Collison OpenClaw was his 'magic AGI moment,' used it to build an app for managing morning messages.

events.title: Google DeepMind UK workers vote to unionize
events.description: Google DeepMind UK employees vote to unionize over Pentagon deal and $1.2B Project Nimbus contract with Israel. First frontier AI lab union bid.

events.title: White House considers executive order for AI model vetting
events.description: Trump administration discussing executive order to create AI working group for pre-release model review. CAISI signs Microsoft, Google DeepMind, xAI for voluntary vetting.

events.title: White House considers vetting AI models before release
events.description: Trump administration discussing executive order to create AI working group to review models before public release, citing Claude Mythos concerns.

events.title: Anthropic launches $1.5B enterprise AI venture with Blackstone, Goldman Sachs
events.description: Anthropic partnered with Blackstone ($300M), Hellman & Friedman ($300M), and Goldman Sachs ($150M) to launch a standalone enterprise AI services firm deploying Claude across PE portfolio companies.

events.title: AI Emergency Diagnosis Study
events.description: Harvard Medical School study finds AI more accurate than doctors in text-based emergency diagnoses.

events.title: DeepSeek V4 Launch
events.description: DeepSeek V4 launched, sparking revaluation of China's AI sector with chip designers as beneficiaries.

events.title: Blend MCP Server
events.description: Blend launches Autopilot MCP Server, opening its lending platform to custom AI agents.
